about: Jingle Bells Kick Face is a meta series where each series unfolds with its own theme and chapters.

characters.name: Rex Jingle
characters.desc: A loud, chaotic protagonist who breaks the rules with a grin.

characters.name: Merry Vale
characters.desc: Quiet strategist; always three steps ahead.

characters.name: Noel Sparks
characters.desc: Explosive energy and a soft spot for chaos.

characters.name: Juno Bell
characters.desc: The voice of reason — until she isn't.

characters.name: Patch Kringle
characters.desc: Inventor of improbable devices and worse ideas.

series.title: Series One: Winter Riot
series.intro: The first series introduces the world and the chaotic spark that sets everything in motion.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Bells
chapters.author: Parin
chapters.code: The bells rang and the city changed. Rex Jingle laughed as the first snow fell.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Cold Front
chapters.author: Parin
chapters.code: Merry Vale mapped the streets while Noel Sparks tested a new device that hummed like a trapped star.

series.title: Series Two: Neon Aftermath
series.intro: After the riot, the city rebuilds under neon lights and uneasy alliances.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Flicker
chapters.author: Parin
chapters.code: Neon signs buzzed back to life. Ivy Frost watched from the rooftop, calculating the next move.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Short Circuit
chapters.author: Parin
chapters.code: Patch Kringle's invention sparked a blackout that revealed more than it hid.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: Reunion
chapters.author: Parin
chapters.code: Old friends met in the dark; old debts were counted in whispers.

series.title: Series Three: m
series.intro: Tensions simmer inhoices made now will echo for years.

suggestions: Add cover art for each series in the repo root and reference the filename in the series.image field.
Upload trailer.mp4 and character images to the repo root so the site can display them.
